DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT DAJANIRA JARRELL'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FOR AN ORDER IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS: A NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO COMPEL WAS FILED; ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ODER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOTION AS AGAINST PLAINTIFF TORRIO DICKERSON WITHOUT THE IMPOSITION OF ANY MONETARY SANCTION WHICH WIIL BE DEALT WITH SEPERATELY. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT DAJANIRA JARRELL'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR AN ORDER IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS: A NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO COMPEL WAS FILED; ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ODER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOTION AS AGAINST PLAINTIFF TORRIO DICKERSON WITHOUT THE IMPOSITION OF ANY MONETARY SANCTION WHICH WIIL BE DEALT WITH SEPERATELY. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFFS, TORRIO DICKERSON AND REMONA BEARQUIVER SHALL JOINTLY PAY TO DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL THE AMOUNT OF $560.00 AS MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR THEIR FAILURE TO FILE TIMELY RESPONSES TO THE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Larisa K. Raymundo, Esq. (925-446-3118; larisa_k_raymundo@progressive.com) of Gilsleider, McMahon, Molinelli & Phan for Defendant/Moving Party.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DAJANIRA JARRELL's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions:

A NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO COMPEL WAS FILED; ACCORDINGLY THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ODER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOTION AS AGAINST PLAINTIFF TORRIO DICKERSON WITHOUT THE IMPOSITION OF ANY MONETARY SANCTION WHICH WIIL BE DEALT WITH SEPERATELY.

THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFFS, TORRIO DICKERSON AND REMONA BEARQUIVER SHALL JOINTLY PAY TO DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL THE AMOUNT OF $560.00 AS MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR THEIR FAILURE TO FILE TIMELY RESPONSES TO THE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
